# Composting Basics

A compost pile turns kitchen and garden waste into rich soil amendment.

## Observations

- [principle] Balance green nitrogen sources with brown carbon sources #compost
- [technique] Turn the pile every couple of weeks to add air #compost
- [gotcha] A wet compacted pile turns sour and slows down #compost (aerate it)
